Meta.title: Löwe Trucks | Commercial vehicles & cars
Meta.description: Premium trucks, commercial vehicles and used cars in Germany. Service, maintenance and fast advice.

Footer.tagline: Your reliable partner in Germany for buying and selling premium commercial vehicles and trucks. Fast processing and transparent histories.
Footer.copyright: RheinLöwe Nutzfahrzeuge GmbH. All rights reserved.

Hero.subtitle: Used and new tractor units in top condition. Transparent inspections & fast purchase via WhatsApp.

Home.trucksSubtitle: Commercial vehicles, separate from our car stock
Home.pkwSubtitle: Passenger cars, not in the truck catalogue

HomeHighlight.warrantyDesc: Inspection reports, full documentation and optional warranty packages, so you can buy commercial vehicles with confidence across Europe.
HomeHighlight.newArrivalsDesc: Fresh trucks and passenger cars in stock, sorted by model year. Open the list and jump straight to each vehicle.
HomeHighlight.maintenanceDesc: Inspection, repair and maintenance for all major commercial brands. Your workshop partner in Germany.

NewArrivals.title: New arrivals
NewArrivals.subtitle: The newest vehicles in our catalogue: trucks and cars combined, sorted by model year (newest first).
NewArrivals.hint: Use the truck and car search pages for more filters and stock.

CategoryStrip.heading: Find your new used truck here

Trucks.title: Trucks & commercial vehicles
Trucks.subtitle: Filter by brand, type and budget. Results in real time.
Trucks.noResultsHint: Relax filters or change your search.

Cars.subtitle: Our car stock is clearly separate from commercial vehicles: same professionalism, different segment.
Cars.filterSubtitle: Filter by brand, body type, fuel and budget. Live search results.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.formLead: Send us a message — we’ll reply by email.
Contact.fastText: Use our WhatsApp service for direct advice.

Service.heroText: We take care of your trucks, from scheduled maintenance to complex repairs. All common brands, clear agreements, fast turnaround.
Service.sectionText: Selected workshop services for trucks and commercial vehicles. Ask us for custom packages.
Service.ctaText: Call or message us on WhatsApp. We’ll get back quickly with parts and timing suggestions.

items.title: Inspection & check
items.text: Safety and function check to manufacturer specs: lights, brakes, coupling and chassis.

items.title: Engine & drivetrain
items.text: Oil and filters, timing belts/chains, axles and differentials, built for high mileage.

items.title: Brakes & retarder
items.text: Discs and pads, air brake system, retarder inspection and adjustment.

items.title: Diagnostics & electronics
items.text: OEM-level OBD, fault memory, sensors, AdBlue and driver assistance systems.

items.title: Climate & auxiliary heating
items.text: Refrigerant service, compressor check, auxiliary heating/climate before winter.

items.title: MOT preparation
items.text: Pre-check, defect rectification and appointment support for a smooth test.

items.title: Fleet maintenance plans
items.text: Plans by mileage and duty cycle: less downtime, predictable costs.

items.title: Repair & overhaul
items.text: Mechanics, hydraulics, bodies and special equipment: transparent pricing, quality parts.

TruckDetail.whatsappPrefill: Hello TruckMaster, I am interested in the vehicle: {title} ({price}). Is the truck still available?

CarDetail.whatsappPrefill: Hello, I am interested in the car: {title} ({price}). Is the vehicle still available?
